assignment

2026-03-20

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(edgeR) 
  library(epiwraps)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(sechm) 
})
options(timeout = 3600)
download.file("https://ethz-ins.org/content/mouse_mm38_hippocampus.peakCounts.SE.rds",
              "hippocampus_data.rds",mode = "wb")
se <- readRDS("hippocampus_data.rds")
se
## class: RangedSummarizedExperiment 
## dim: 20660 12 
## metadata(0):
## assays(1): counts
## rownames: NULL
## rowData names(0):
## colnames(12): Control_female_GSM6041841.bam
##   Control_female_GSM6041842.bam ... FSS_male_GSM6041857.bam
##   FSS_male_GSM6041858.bam
## colData names(1): depth
sample_names <- rownames(colData(se))
se$stress_group <- factor(ifelse(grepl("^FSS_", sample_names), "FSS", "Control"))
se$sex_group <- factor(ifelse(grepl("_female_", sample_names), "female", "male"))
table(se$stress_group)
## 
## Control     FSS 
##       6       6
table(se$sex_group)
## 
## female   male 
##      6      6
as.data.frame(colData(se))
##                                  depth stress_group sex_group
## Control_female_GSM6041841.bam 73170149      Control    female
## Control_female_GSM6041842.bam 93995034      Control    female
## Control_female_GSM6041843.bam 40167775      Control    female
## Control_male_GSM6041844.bam   70491005      Control      male
## Control_male_GSM6041845.bam   84985977      Control      male
## Control_male_GSM6041846.bam   90317960      Control      male
## FSS_female_GSM6041853.bam     90526032          FSS    female
## FSS_female_GSM6041854.bam     73674456          FSS    female
## FSS_female_GSM6041855.bam     49285912          FSS    female
## FSS_male_GSM6041856.bam       82385764          FSS      male
## FSS_male_GSM6041857.bam       68623011          FSS      male
## FSS_male_GSM6041858.bam       81801232          FSS      male

#Differential analysis stress

se <- readRDS("hippocampus_data.rds")
if (is.null(rownames(se))) {
  rownames(se) <- paste0("peak_", seq_len(nrow(se)))}
se$stress_group <- factor(ifelse(grepl("^FSS_", sample_names), "FSS", "Control"))
dds_stress <- edgeR::DGEList(assay(se), group = se$stress_group)
dds_stress <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(dds_stress)
dds_stress <- edgeR::estimateDisp(dds_stress)
## Using classic mode.
result_stress <- as.data.frame(topTags(exactTest(dds_stress), Inf))
ggplot(result_stress, aes(logFC, -log10(FDR))) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Differential accessibility: FSS vs Control",
    x = "log2 Fold Change (FSS vs Control)")

#Top 10
top10_stress <- head(result_stress, 10)
top10_stress
##                logFC   logCPM       PValue        FDR
## peak_15757  2.956602 5.568769 2.042974e-06 0.04220785
## peak_14137 -5.547326 7.661587 3.527416e-05 0.12814460
## peak_19358 -5.303580 6.889311 4.895397e-05 0.12814460
## peak_8714  -4.828255 8.216940 5.221790e-05 0.12814460
## peak_2118  -5.984659 8.519979 5.504660e-05 0.12814460
## peak_4967   2.858099 4.136854 5.892303e-05 0.12814460
## peak_869   -4.385188 6.854042 6.315310e-05 0.12814460
## peak_3430  -4.283877 7.508608 7.465340e-05 0.12814460
## peak_12264 -4.818518 5.728855 7.652971e-05 0.12814460
## peak_17038 -4.973348 7.122513 9.182810e-05 0.12814460
assay(se, "logcpm", withDimnames = FALSE) <- log1p(cpm(dds_stress))
topRegions <- head(rownames(result_stress), 10)
topRegions
##  [1] "peak_15757" "peak_14137" "peak_19358" "peak_8714"  "peak_2118" 
##  [6] "peak_4967"  "peak_869"   "peak_3430"  "peak_12264" "peak_17038"
sechm(se, features = topRegions, assayName = "logcpm", gaps_at = "stress_group")

#Differential analysis sex

se <- readRDS("hippocampus_data.rds")
if (is.null(rownames(se))) {rownames(se) <- paste0("peak_", seq_len(nrow(se)))}
se$sex_group <- factor(ifelse(grepl("_female_", sample_names), "female", "male"))
dds_sex <- edgeR::DGEList(assay(se), group=se$sex_group)
dds_sex <- edgeR::calcNormFactors(dds_sex)
dds_sex <- edgeR::estimateDisp(dds_sex)
## Using classic mode.
result_sex <- as.data.frame(topTags(exactTest(dds_sex), Inf))
head(result_sex)
##               logFC   logCPM       PValue          FDR
## peak_20644 6.876486 6.682547 1.321292e-22 2.729790e-18
## peak_20643 6.866184 6.813826 1.663518e-19 1.718414e-15
## peak_20640 6.419374 5.522297 9.328448e-19 6.424191e-15
## peak_20647 6.184386 5.260409 4.698790e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_20648 7.180128 6.896536 5.236867e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_20642 8.759949 4.548791 7.215103e-17 2.053828e-13
ggplot(result_sex, aes(logFC, -log10(FDR))) + geom_point() +
  labs(title= "Differential accessibility female vs male", 
       x= "log2 Fold Change (female vs male)")

#Top 10
top10_stress <- head(result_sex, 10)
top10_stress
##                logFC   logCPM       PValue          FDR
## peak_20644  6.876486 6.682547 1.321292e-22 2.729790e-18
## peak_20643  6.866184 6.813826 1.663518e-19 1.718414e-15
## peak_20640  6.419374 5.522297 9.328448e-19 6.424191e-15
## peak_20647  6.184386 5.260409 4.698790e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_20648  7.180128 6.896536 5.236867e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_20642  8.759949 4.548791 7.215103e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_20650  7.634611 6.982274 7.493887e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_18254 -4.939005 7.417084 7.952868e-17 2.053828e-13
## peak_17605 -5.905087 5.983284 1.079283e-16 2.069954e-13
## peak_17602 -5.473249 6.233290 1.086205e-16 2.069954e-13
assay(se, "logcpm", withDimnames = FALSE) <- log1p(cpm(dds_sex))
topRegions <- head(rownames(result_sex), 10)
topRegions
##  [1] "peak_20644" "peak_20643" "peak_20640" "peak_20647" "peak_20648"
##  [6] "peak_20642" "peak_20650" "peak_18254" "peak_17605" "peak_17602"
sechm(se, features = topRegions, assayName = "logcpm", gaps_at = "sex_group")
